name: Trip Cancellation Shield
description: Reimburses non-refundable travel costs if your trip is cancelled due to illness, injury, extreme weather or airline failure. Policy activates instantly at checkout.

name: Travel Medical Emergency Cover
description: Covers emergency medical treatment, hospitalisation and evacuation costs incurred while travelling abroad. Includes 24/7 emergency assistance hotline.

name: Electronics Extended Warranty
description: Extends the manufacturer warranty by up to 2 additional years on consumer electronics including smartphones, laptops, tablets and audio devices. Covers parts and labour.

name: Screen Damage Cover
description: Covers the full cost of screen repair or replacement following accidental cracks, liquid damage or impact. Includes one claim per policy period with same-day repair partners.

name: Personal Accident – Food Delivery
description: Purpose-built for food delivery riders. Covers accidental death, permanent disability and hospitalisation cash benefits while on active delivery. Pays within 5 business days.

name: Health OPD Cover
description: Covers outpatient (OPD) medical consultations, diagnostics, prescriptions and specialist visits. Reimburses up to SGD 150 per visit with no waiting period after activation.

name: Return Journey Protection
description: Covers the cost of rebooking your return journey if it is disrupted by flight cancellation, missed connection or natural disaster. Includes accommodation allowance of SGD 200/night.

name: Purchase Protection
description: Protects newly purchased fashion items against accidental damage, theft and loss within 90 days of purchase. Covers clothing, footwear, bags and accessories up to the insured value.

name: Luxury Item Theft Guard
description: Premium theft and loss protection for high-value fashion items including designer bags, watches and jewellery. Worldwide cover for 12 months with cashless claim settlement.

name: Food Delivery Order Guarantee
description: Guarantees a refund if your food order is significantly delayed, arrives damaged or is never delivered. Instant self-service claim via the GrabInsurance app — no waiting required.
